Drop your emoji.
Own the map.

Pin expressive emoji statuses to real-world locations. See what's happening nearby. Climb the leaderboard.

Learn more ↓

Everything you need to own the map

Express yourself, compete with friends, and discover what's happening around you — all from a single, beautifully simple app.

📍

Pin Your Mood

Drop emoji statuses at your real-world location. Express how you feel, what you're doing, or what's happening around you.

⏳

Ephemeral by Design

Statuses expire after 1–7 days. Every day the map refreshes with new energy. No permanent digital footprint.

🏆

Climb the Leaderboard

Compete for the most-liked status hourly, daily, and weekly. Rise to the top of your neighborhood.

🌍

Discover Nearby

See what people around you are posting in real-time. Find the vibe before you get there.

🛡️

Privacy First

Your exact location is never stored. Built-in location fuzzing, approximate mode, and “When In Use” only permissions.

🏅

Earn Badges

Unlock 12 achievement badges across streaks, statuses posted, and likes given. Show off your dedication.

Simple, lifetime pricing

Pay once, keep forever. No subscriptions, no recurring charges.

Frequently asked questions

What is Pinmoji?

Pinmoji is a location-based emoji status app. You pin expressive emoji statuses to real-world locations on a map, see what others nearby are posting, and compete on leaderboards for the most-liked status.

Is Pinmoji free?

Yes! The core experience is completely free. You can post statuses, like others' posts, discover nearby activity, and access leaderboards without paying anything. Premium tiers unlock extras like the full emoji library, map flair, and extended history.

What do the paid tiers include?

Pinmoji offers four lifetime tiers — Bronze ($0.99), Silver ($1.99), Gold ($3.99), and Diamond ($9.99). Each unlocks progressively more features like the full emoji library with skin tones, calendar export, map flair effects, and extended status history. All purchases are one-time — no subscriptions.

How long do statuses last?

Statuses expire after 1–7 days. Once they expire, they disappear from the map, keeping the experience fresh and ephemeral.

How does Pinmoji protect my privacy?

Your exact location is never stored. We use server-side location fuzzing to reduce precision to approximately 11 meters. The app only accesses your location "When In Use" — never in the background. You can also enable approximate location mode for an additional ~500m privacy layer.

What are badges?

Pinmoji has 12 achievement badges across three categories: posting streaks (7, 30, 90, 365 consecutive days), statuses posted (5, 25, 100, 500 total), and likes given (10, 50, 200, 1000 total). Each category has Bronze, Silver, Gold, and Diamond tiers.

How do leaderboards work?

Leaderboards rank the most-liked active statuses in your area across three time windows: hourly, daily, and weekly. They reset with each period, so everyone gets a fresh shot at the top.

Can I use Pinmoji without creating an account?

Yes. Guest mode lets you try Pinmoji with a local-only experience. You can upgrade to a full account anytime with Sign in with Apple or email, and your data will be migrated.

How do I delete my account?

You can delete your account from Settings within the app. After a 30-day grace period for recovery, all your data is permanently deleted from our servers.

What platforms is Pinmoji available on?

Pinmoji is currently available on iOS (iPhone) and requires iOS 17 or later.

Ready to drop your first emoji?

Join the map. It's free.
